notes: Notes 新建备忘录 toolbar button via debug.smartPress.

Reference data: macos.notes.create_and_verify_note.v2 ran this query under debug.axPressButton and validated the AX path with hands-on operator cooperation; a later hands-off replay (run_1779371986165_16879_0) failed because the AX subtree did not contain the button at that moment. Treat the expected strategy here as 'AX when sidebar/iCloud state is settled, pointer-click otherwise'.
Promotion criterion: ≥3 hands-off replays on a quiescent desktop must each complete the recipe; the recorded strategy may differ between them.
TextEdit 'New Document' button on the launcher Open dialog.

Expected: when TextEdit has been launched fresh and shows the Open Document picker, the 新建文稿 button is AX-pressable. If TextEdit is already open with documents, the Open dialog may not be present, in which case smartPress will likely either error or fall back to a pointer click on a different target — either is fine data.
Promotion criterion: ≥3 hands-off replays on a quiescent desktop with TextEdit closed at start (so it boots into the launcher) must each complete the recipe.
